tabs.name: main
tabs.code:
# @viz

class LabeledRect(Panel):
    def __init__(self, label:str = '', width: int = 2, color=(180, 130, 100), **kwargs):
        super().__init__(**kwargs)
        self.rect = Rect(width=width, color=color)
        self.label = Label(label=label, width=width)
        self.add(
            self.rect, self.label
        )

a = LabeledRect(label='a', x=0, width=1)
aa = Rect(x=0, y=1, color = (255,100,100))
# @end
# @viz
a.x=1
aa.x=1
# @end
